prompt_text:
### Demographics: 53-year-old Asian woman

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 5 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes during urgent care evaluation for fatigue/blurred vision
Current symptoms: Postprandial fatigue and thirst noted; no DKA/HHS signs; no recent hypoglycemia

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 3b (30-44)
Heart failure: HFimpEF (NYHA Class II)
Body mass index category: Normal
Major Depressive Disorder
Recurrent Complicated Urinary Tract Infections
Psychotic Disorder on Atypical Antipsychotics
Community-acquired pneumonia (resolved)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 3b (30-44); HF: HFimpEF (NYHA Class II); ASCVD (No); MASLD: Normal; BMI Category: Normal
- Family history: No family history of type 2 diabetes (elicited)
- Social history: Current smoker (10 cigarettes/day for 25 years; ~12.5 pack-years); Alcohol 1-2 drinks/week

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 500mg twice daily; Quetiapine (150 mg nightly), Sertraline (50 mg daily), Losartan (50 mg daily), Finerenone (10 mg daily), Nitrofurantoin (100 mg twice daily for prophylaxis)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 62.1 kg; Height 169.1 cm; BMI 21.7 kg/m²; Blood pressure 145/86 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 9.7%; 9 months ago 9.0%; 6 months ago 8.5%; 3 months ago 8.0%; current 6.2%), FPG (12 months ago 245mg/dL; 9 months ago 252mg/dL; 6 months ago 178mg/dL; 3 months ago 165mg/dL; current 130mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 63.9kg; 9 months ago 61.7kg; 6 months ago 59.7kg; 3 months ago 57.7kg; current 62.1kg), Height (12 months ago 169.1cm; 9 months ago 169.1cm; 6 months ago 169.1cm; 3 months ago 169.1cm; current 169.1cm), BMI (12 months ago 22.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 22.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 21.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 20.0kg/m²; current 21.7kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 140mmHg; 9 months ago 144mmHg; 6 months ago 145mmHg; 3 months ago 146mmHg; current 145mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 89mmHg; 9 months ago 85mmHg; 6 months ago 85mmHg; 3 months ago 86mmHg; current 86mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 16U/L; 9 months ago 18U/L; 6 months ago 16U/L; 3 months ago 22U/L; current 21U/L), AST (12 months ago 10U/L; 9 months ago 17U/L; 6 months ago 11U/L; 3 months ago 8.0U/L; current 15U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.9mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.8mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.8mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.8mg/dL; current 0.7mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 36mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 31mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 31mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 34mL/min/1.73m²; current 32mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 154mg/g; 9 months ago 162mg/g; 6 months ago 195mg/g; 3 months ago 198mg/g; current 157mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 79mg/dL; 9 months ago 79mg/dL; 6 months ago 81mg/dL; 3 months ago 74mg/dL; current 77mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 49mg/dL; 9 months ago 53mg/dL; 6 months ago 49mg/dL; 3 months ago 50mg/dL; current 51mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 137mg/dL; 9 months ago 143mg/dL; 6 months ago 138mg/dL; 3 months ago 142mg/dL; current 149mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 12.0g/dL; 9 months ago 11.2g/dL; 6 months ago 11.0g/dL; 3 months ago 11.0g/dL; current 11.0g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Negative (Current); fasting C-peptide 1.71 ng/mL (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Excellent adherence (estimated ≥90%); SMBG 4-5 times/week; diet/exercise well controlled.
Financial context: Patient has standard insurance with moderate copays and a monthly medication budget of ≤ KRW 500,000.
